title: Scientists Discover Rare Fossil Footprints in South Korea Preserved in 106-Million-Year-Old Rock
description: Beneath the surface of a 106-million-year-old rock layer, scientists uncovered footprints that don’t quite behave the way they should.

title: ASI Takes Up Restoration of Ancient Chennakesava Temple in Annamayya District
description: The temple was originally built by the Yadavaraya kings in the 12th century CE.

title: This Ancient Mars Rock Kept a Billion-Year-Old Secret, Curiosity Finally Cracked It Open - Indian Defence Review

title: Border wall crews damage ancient Tohono O'odham site
description: A 1,000-year-old site along the Arizona-Mexico border in the Cabeza Prieta National Wildlife Refuge was damaged and others could be too as a second wall is added to the border, tribal officials say.

title: Ancient Traditions Reflect Scientific Wisdom: Venkaiah Naidu
